title: Baden, Aargau — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Baden, Aargau: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Baden is a city in Aargau with a population of 20,000. A historic spa town in the Limmat Valley near Zurich, known for its Roman ruins, thermal baths, and as the global headquarters of ABB and Axpo.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
